form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 8 length fourth (23.00) at Warrnambool. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Needs to find best and prepared to watch this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (23.56) over 400m at this track. Has a decent strike-rate off the draw but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when third (23.36) over 400m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked shortly after start.

form.formComment: Made a winning debut over 305m at this track where he settled on speed and went on to score a 3.5 lengths win 17.84. Can only be further improved and expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior went down fighting when second (23.42) over 400m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw but in the mix on her best form.

Checked and fell on turn out of back straight.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 400m. Safe beginner who should take catching despite the draw.
